title: nasturtium menziesii
intro: Nasturtium menziesii, also known as Mountain Crest or Menzies' Cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, native to the mountainous regions of the Pacific Northwest in North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nasturtium menziesii include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support the immune system. Nasturtium menziesii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is sometimes used as a natural remedy for skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
